message:
feat(tldr): comprehensive mobile-first UI polish, section nav, and accessibility improvements

Major UI/UX overhaul of the TL;DR flywheel tools page focused on mobile
responsiveness, visual quality, and accessibility:

New components:
- TldrSectionNav (components/tldr-section-nav.tsx): sticky section navigation
  with core/supporting/get-started anchors and item counts
- Loading state (app/tldr/loading.tsx): skeleton loading UI for the TL;DR page

Page layout (app/tldr/page.tsx):
- Add section navigation with useMemo-computed nav items from tool categories
- Replace flat gradient background with mesh gradient using multiple
  radial-gradient layers for depth
- Wrap flywheel diagram in ErrorBoundary with descriptive fallback message
- Copy button: increase touch target to 44x44px minimum (WCAG 2.1 AA),
  center icon with flexbox
- "Copied!" toast: wrap in ARIA live region (role="status", aria-live="polite")
  for screen reader announcement

Bottom sheet (components/bottom-sheet.tsx, +170 lines):
- Extensive mobile interaction improvements: drag handle sizing, snap points,
  scroll behavior, backdrop blur, touch feedback

TldrHero (components/tldr-hero.tsx):
- Enhanced responsive typography and spacing
- Improved animation variants

TldrSynergyDiagram (components/tldr-synergy-diagram.tsx, +200 lines):
- Reworked layout for mobile viewports
- Better connection line rendering and node positioning
- Responsive breakpoint handling

TldrToolCard (components/tldr-tool-card.tsx):
- Refined hover/focus states and touch targets
- Improved icon and text layout density

TldrToolGrid (components/tldr-tool-grid.tsx, +150 lines):
- Enhanced grid layout with better responsive breakpoints
- Improved category section headings and spacing

Tests updated to match component API changes.
Beads issue tracker synced with current state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
